title: Jbel Outgui
summary: Jbel Outgui is an extinct shield volcano located 15 km southeast of the city of El Hajeb in the Middle Atlas of Morocco. The mountain is one of the three main volcanic structures of the Azrou region with Jbel El Koudiate and Jbel Tamarrakoit.
